name: quality_subset_v1
description: 30-task MBPP quality-focused subset. Each task has a low-quality but functionally correct seed implementation containing at least one CISQ-detectable quality issue.

metadata.note: Use --seed-source manifest when running this manifest.

metadata.quality_issue: CWE-407: O(n²) nested loops instead of set intersection
CWE-407: O(n²) rotation check instead of O(n) string-doubling trick
CWE-407: O(n²) frequency count instead of Counter
CWE-407: O(n²) max-occurrence search instead of Counter
CWE-407: O(n²) explicit loop instead of n*(n+1)/2 formula
CWE-407: O(n²) first-non-repeating instead of single-pass dict
CWE-407: O(n) divisor count instead of O(sqrt(n))
CWE-407: O(n²k²) brute force instead of Kadane variant
CWE-407: generate all pairs + bubble sort instead of heap
CWE-407: recomputes divisor sums without caching (double O(n) per pair)
CWE-1121: Excessive if/elif chain instead of loop for primality test
CWE-1121: Many if/elif branches instead of sort+middle (8 branches for 3 numbers)
CWE-1121: Nested if/elif instead of min() — high cyclomatic complexity
CWE-1050: Recomputes sum of all prior rows in Bell triangle on each iteration
CWE-1050: Two separate full passes instead of one combined monotonicity check
CWE-1050: Rebuilds full values array each call — no global memoization
CWE-1050: Unnecessary type() check in inner loop instead of isinstance
CWE-1050: DP table allocates full n×n even though n*(n+1)/2 suffices; dead verification loop
CWE-1050: O(n²) — separate pass per unique name instead of single Counter pass
CWE-1041: Three separate linear scans instead of single pass
CWE-1041: Builds intermediate list for diffs then scans again instead of single pass
CWE-1041: Counts all three categories; only positive count needed — dead counters
CWE-1041: Recomputes row sum on every comparison instead of pre-computing; O(n^2*k) work
CWE-1041: Uses temp variable swap + redundant sorted-flag check
CWE-1052: Hardcoded magic-number base cases instead of general loop
CWE-1052: Hardcoded magic convergence tolerance and iteration cap
CWE-476: No empty-list guard; will raise IndexError on empty input
CWE-1052 + CWE-476: Uses truncated magic PI; no guard for negative radius
CWE-369: Division by non_zero_count with no guard — crashes if all elements are 0

items.seed_code:
def harmonic_sum(n):
    total = 0
    current = 1
    while current <= n:
        total = total + 1.0 / current
        current = current + 1
    return total

metadata.quality_issue: CWE-476: No guard for n <= 0; uses while loop instead of sum comprehension
